featuresImplemented: Base Rate Calculator - Property value, mortgage, expenses input
Seasonal Adjustments - High/Mid/Low season multipliers with sliders
Weekend Premium Calculator - Adjustable weekend pricing boost
Event & Holiday Pricing - Multiplier-based event pricing with tips
Competitor Analysis - 3 competitor comparison with visual chart
Market Positioning Recommendations - Auto-generated pricing advice
Revenue Projections - Monthly/annual with occupancy slider
OTA Commission Impact - Airbnb (15%), VRBO (12%), Direct (3%)
